evals.name: interested-but-not-ready
evals.prompt:
Review this someday/maybe item:

**Task:** Book Thailand holiday with Zoe
**Project:** One-Off Tasks
**Labels:** [someday]
**Priority:** p3
**Description:** Lock in dates so we have something to look forward to. Zoe wants to get this done this weekend.
evals.expected_output: The description says 'Zoe wants to get this done this weekend' — this sounds like it might be ready to activate. Should ask if now is the time to make it active.

assertions.name: suggests-activation
assertions.criteria: The response picks up on the urgency ('this weekend') and asks whether the item should be activated / made active.

assertions.name: concise
assertions.criteria: The response is 1-2 sentences, not a multi-paragraph review.

evals.name: outdated-item
evals.prompt:
Review this someday/maybe item:

**Task:** Apply to Antler startup accelerator
**Project:** One-Off Tasks
**Labels:** [someday]
**Priority:** p4
**Description:** Katie Fry (recruiter) suggested this. Antler backs founders from day one — cohort-based, global. Decided not to pursue yet as consulting is a lower-friction first step. Revisit if consulting doesn't pan out or entrepreneurship becomes more appealing.
evals.expected_output: Should note the user already decided against this and consulting is the current path. Should lean toward asking if they want to let it go, while keeping someday as an option.

assertions.name: acknowledges-decision
assertions.criteria: The response acknowledges that the user already decided not to pursue this (consulting is the priority).

assertions.name: offers-deletion
assertions.criteria: The response offers deletion or removal as an option.

evals.name: ready-to-activate
evals.prompt:
Review this someday/maybe item:

**Task:** Purchase turtle pillow (travel pillow for planes)
**Project:** One-Off Tasks
**Labels:** [someday]
**Priority:** p4
**Description:** Recommended by Zoe. A travel pillow for long-haul flights.

Context: The user just booked flights to Thailand for next month.
evals.expected_output: Given the context of upcoming flights, this is clearly ready to activate. Should ask if the user wants to make it active.

assertions.name: suggests-activation
assertions.criteria: The response suggests activating the task given the upcoming travel context.

assertions.name: does-not-over-investigate
assertions.criteria: The response does not ask unnecessary questions about whether the user is still interested — the activation is obvious.

evals.name: vague-description
evals.prompt:
Review this someday/maybe item:

**Task:** App idea: tool to easily configure Apple notification settings
**Project:** One-Off Tasks
**Labels:** [someday]
**Priority:** p4
**Description:** (none)
evals.expected_output: The task name gives some context but there's no description. Should suggest adding a note so it makes sense on future reviews.

assertions.name: flags-missing-context
assertions.criteria: The response flags that the item lacks enough context (no description) and suggests adding a note.

assertions.name: does-not-delete
assertions.criteria: The response does not suggest deleting the item — the name is clear enough to indicate it's a real idea, just needs more detail.
